text: Bright fluorescent lights and bold colors surround me, evoking a sense of curiosity and alertness. As I step inside this R+D space, I feel both energized and unsettled—the artificial illumination sharpens my awareness of the technological world while dulling the organic. The words about confusion and blurred perception resonate deeply within me. I find myself contemplating the delicate boundary between clarity and ambiguity, order and chaos, especially amidst innovation and research. I feel like an explorer on the edge of understanding, suspended between fascination and questioning what lies just out of clear sight.
